prompt: Apply the dark mode to the line diagram.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which depicts a financial bar and line chart on a teal background. Apply a dark mode aesthetic to this information graphic. Use image 2 as a reference for the dark mode style, incorporating its deep black background and subtle, glowing accents into the chart elements while maintaining data legibility.
objects: chart elements (e.g., bars, lines, grid, axes)
